ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., junior, petite, plus) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size associated with the measurements */,
  "height_in" TEXT /* Height range in inches */,
  "height_cm" TEXT /* Height range in centimeters */,
  "weight_lb" TEXT /* Weight range in pounds */,
  "weight_kg" TEXT /* Weight range in kilograms */,
  "chest_in" TEXT /* Chest size range in inches */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest size range in centimeters */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist size range in inches */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist size range in centimeters */,
  "hip_in" TEXT /* Hip size range in inches */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip size range in centimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurements were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurements were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Outerwear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for the size and category */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Low stock threshold for the size and category */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the size and category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fit model */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the fit model */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurements of the fit model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fit model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fit model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_models_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_models_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., designer, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource being accessed (e.g., size chart, inventory) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the size and category */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks for the size and category */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions for the size and category */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the size and category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
